textByHash.7715cfe8550fddc5642bebdde1447b96d665cadf: Hello. Are you here for my black dragons?
textByHash.df91a889eed4c1f9d34b87604a8e137657958ed3: Fair enough. Do what you have to do.
textByHash.67ee8242bf8119ace245957e3bc9e57c3eddd44b: Oh, good. In that case you're welcome to go and admire them, but don't get any ideas about killing them.
textByHash.9ace6895eef190c76b64d43dc5b9925e9b96193a: Because I like my black dragons, and I had to work hard to get access to their lair, and I don't want people using them for training without a reason.
textByHash.9499723d1ee65dbd7f246273eec93dbdb3da9164: So if one of the Slayer Masters sent you to slay black dragons, that's fine, but otherwise you should go and train elsewhere.
textByHash.6d8f205c269b5ffa1510a6b20e38fad5d319f8b3: I'd rather people didn't train on my dragons at all, but I've got a distant cousin who's a Slayer Master, so I've got to support the family business.
textByHash.7574898f5ede2c5ccf27f49f9e5ae0a43f1ac75b: Hey, go and train somewhere else! I'm not having people mess with my dragons unless a Slayer Master's told them to do it.
